title: Implement dependency-free source registry validator
action: Add a Node validation script for source registry JSON files.
implementation: Validate required fields, enum values, URL parseability, unique source ids across files, and official/secondary trust rules.
Fail with non-zero exit code and a clear message when any source is invalid.
Print `Source registry validation passed` when all checks pass.

execution.summary: Implemented dependency-free source registry validator using Node built-ins.
